rationale: This is a Bus Jam / parking-puzzle "fail bait" archetype — a tap-to-solve color-matching loop that has zero mechanical overlap with aquapark.io's physics-based sliding/bumping racing core. The palette (green/red/blue) and hand-cursor puzzle staging also clash with the bright blue-water, character-on-slide visual identity, so reusing the format would require a full rebuild rather than a swap-in. Only the broad casual/young audience overlaps; recommend skipping this archetype unless we genuinely fake-puzzle the slide (e.g., "pick the right tube to avoid the obstacle") which is a stretch and not where this cluster's signal lives.
